competitive_scores.overall_assessment: Limited pressure range and no accuracy or temperature specs; output signal lacks required communication protocols.

technical_correlations.explanation: Accuracy and pressure range are independent specs; improving one does not necessarily affect the other.
Certain output signals (e.g., HART) require specific supply voltage ranges to function properly.
Higher temperature ranges often require enhanced mechanical durability to withstand harsh environments.

key_insights: Most products lack explicit specs for mechanical durability, ingress protection, certification, and serviceability, indicating gaps in addressing these customer needs.
Rosemount 3051 leads in accuracy and communication protocol support but falls short in pressure range for high-pressure applications.
SITRANS P310 offers excellent accuracy and good pressure range but lacks temperature range and durability data.
2600T Series provides versatile output signals but has marginal accuracy and temperature range performance.
P-30/P-31 Standard transmitter lacks critical specs for accuracy, temperature range, and communication protocols, limiting its suitability for demanding applications.

2600T Series Pressure Transmitters Model.output_signal: 4-20 mA HART, PROFIBUS PA, FOUNDATION Fieldbus

SITRANS P310.pressure_range: 0.01 bar to 700 bar (0.15 psi to 10153 psi)
